sections.short-biography: Killed Fan Chou at a drinking party for his kinsman by marriage Li Jue.

full_text:
Hu Feng
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hu Feng. Killed Fan Chou at a drinking party for his kinsman by marriage Li Jue. Hu Feng was affiliated with Li Jue.
